title: Sights and attractions in Tübingen
meta_description: Explore attractions, museums, castle and the old town in Tübingen.
text: Tübingen offers many attractions including Hohentübingen Castle, the historic old town, museums, the Neckar river and scenic walking tours.

title: Food and drinks in Tübingen
meta_description: Restaurants, cafes and bars in Tübingen.
text: Visitors can find food and drinks in many restaurants, cafes, bars and beer gardens in Tübingen. Local Swabian food is popular in the old town.

title: University of Tübingen
meta_description: Research and study at the University of Tübingen.
text: The University of Tübingen is a leading research university with faculties, study programmes, libraries and campus facilities.
